fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track the VIX futures curve, making it a tool for hedging against market uncertainty or for short-term speculation on volatility. Recent articles highlight its use as a surrogate for S&P 500 bear positions and as a unique hedging instrument. However, the leveraged nature and contango in VIX futures mean that "good things do not last" for long-term holders, suggesting it is best suited for tactical trades rather than buy-and-hold strategies.
